steps.title: Substitute x = 2 into the function
steps.content:
We have $f(x) = 25x + 80$. To find $f(2)$, replace $x$ with \$2$:

$$f(2) = 25(2) + 80$$

steps.title: Evaluate the expression
steps.content: Calculate $25(2) = 50$, then add \$80$: $$f(2) = 50 + 80 = 130$$ That matches choice C — C is correct.
